description: Send notifications to your own Amazon SNS destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise sns:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters.
name: msg-to-sns

request.template: {"urls":"sns://${ customer_secrets.SNS_ACCESS_KEY_ID }/${ customer_secrets.SNS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY }/${ customer_secrets.SNS_REGION }/${ customer_secrets.SNS_TARGETS }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}

{"urls":"sns://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.access_key_id_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.secret_access_key_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.region_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.targets_secret }} }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}
